steps.title: Use the tablet evidence
steps.content: The tablet suggests Merneith was in charge of the treasury and other central offices. Whether or not she was pharaoh, that evidence points to governmental authority.

steps.title: Reject unsupported topics
steps.content: A concerns chronology, B claims she created writing, and D concerns travel beyond Egypt. None follows from being in charge of central offices. The supported conclusion is an important government role. The answer is C.
